title: Beat Pet
description:
Your Music. His Drum Set.
Beat Pet is a desktop pet who listens to whatever you are listening to and plays the drums along with it in real time.

There are no built-in song lists and no special music files to prepare. Play music from your favorite streaming service, a local media player, a video, or even a game. If your computer can play it, your pet can drum along with it.

Every Song Becomes a Performance
Your pet reacts to the rhythm and different parts of the music, turning every song into a unique performance. A gentle melody, an energetic rock track, or the song you have played a hundred times: each one gives him a new reason to pick up his drumsticks.

A Companion On and Off the Stage
When there is no music, he quietly keeps you company on your desktop. When the music begins, the desktop becomes his stage.

Play anything. He will find the beat.
description_short: A desktop pet who listens to music with you and plays the drums along to the beat. Most of the time, he quietly keeps you company. But when the music starts, the stage is his.
